description: CompositionPurple and black checked shirt made of 100% cotton, has a slim spread collar, a full front buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned epaulettes on shoulders, Western style yoked back and front, seam lines for Fit on front and back, mock welt pockets on chest and a curved hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this stylish shirt with its cowboy style yoke is kept feminine with puffed sleeves and a slim collar, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”
